sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt64, address UInt64, trace Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(address) AS address_lines FROM test_data WHERE id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE address < 531055180);
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(arrayJoin(trace)) AS inline_lines FROM test_data WHERE id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE address >= 531055183);
SELECT id, addressToLineWithInlines(address) AS inlines FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE id > 1);
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(address) FROM (SELECT address FROM test_data WHERE address != ALL (SELECT address FROM test_data WHERE id = 1));
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(address) AS line_info FROM test_data WHERE address != ALL (SELECT address FROM test_data WHERE id = 2) AND NULL IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test (temp_id UInt64, temp_address UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY temp_id;
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(temp_address) AS temp_inlines FROM temp_test WHERE temp_id != ALL (SELECT temp_id FROM temp_test WHERE temp_address IS NULL);
